title: crotalaria paracistoides
intro: Crotalaria paracistoides, also known as a species of flowering plant in the legume family, is a type of shrub or small tree native to tropical regions. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its health benefits. The health benefits associated with Crotalaria paracistoides include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support respiratory health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as an infusion or decoction, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
